chaosroll.gui.title: Chaos Roll — Settings
chaosroll.event.bedrock_cage.name: Bedrock Cage
chaosroll.event.bedrock_cage.desc: Trapped in a 3×3×3 bedrock cube for 30s
chaosroll.event.iron_lung.name: Iron Lungs
chaosroll.event.bat_storm.name: Bat Storm
chaosroll.event.magnet_curse.name: Magnet Curse
chaosroll.event.magnet_curse.desc: 30s — items fly out of your hands every 5s
chaosroll.event.total_darkness.name: Total Darkness
chaosroll.event.total_darkness.desc: 45s of Blindness X + Mining Fatigue III
chaosroll.event.soul_burn.name: Soul Burn
chaosroll.event.effect_casino.name: Effect Casino
chaosroll.event.inventory_recycle.name: Inventory Recycle
chaosroll.event.inventory_recycle.desc: Half your inventory is replaced with random items
chaosroll.event.rocket_boots.name: Rocket Boots
chaosroll.event.static_shock.name: Static Shock
chaosroll.event.static_shock.desc: 60s — your own lightning hits you every 5s
chaosroll.event.direction_lock.name: Direction Lock
chaosroll.event.mob_morph.name: Morph
chaosroll.event.mob_morph.desc: 60s — others see you as a random mob
chaosroll.event.midas_touch.name: Midas Touch
chaosroll.event.midas_touch.desc: 30s — every block you break drops gold. Then -10 HP.
chaosroll.event.guardian_angel.name: Guardian Angel
chaosroll.event.guardian_angel.desc: If you die — full HP/food respawn. Once.
chaosroll.event.home_beacon.name: Home Beacon
chaosroll.event.home_beacon.desc: 30s — Speed II + Haste II + Resistance II + Regen I
chaosroll.cmd.blocked: Event '%s' blocked. It will not roll for you.
chaosroll.msg.guardian: [Chaos Roll] Angel saved you! No more angel.
chaosroll.msg.vote_prompt: [Chaos Roll] Vote: skip '%s' for %s? /chaosroll vote yes / /chaosroll vote no
